_readme: Concord's SELLING prices (per pair) shown in the Lens Finder next to the Hoya cost. Copy this file to config/cec_prices.json (git-ignored) and fill it in. Rules: 'design_prices' price progressives/occupationals by name snippet + index (coating doesn't change the base). 'sv_tiers' price single vision by COATING tier + index, so the sell price tracks the coating dropdown. 'surcharge' adds to any base when the name contains the snippet (e.g. photochromic). 'blank_names' suppress a price for variants that vary. Index keys are strings like "1.60". Empty lists (like this template) show no CEC prices. Example: {"surcharge": {"Sensity": 120}, "blank_names": ["Polarised"], "design_prices": [{"match": "Dynamic Prime", "by_index": {"1.60": 530}}], "sv_tiers": [{"coating": "Diamond Finish", "by_index": {"1.67": 290}}, {"coating": "ViewProtect", "by_index": {"1.67": 240}}]}.
